proposed_base_material_variables.name: interstitial_content
proposed_base_material_variables.definition: The concentration of interstitial elements such as Carbon (C), Oxygen (O), Sulfur (S), Nitrogen (N), and Phosphorus (P), typically measured in parts per million (ppm).

proposed_base_material_variables.name: alloy_design_substitution
proposed_base_material_variables.definition: Details regarding the atomic percentage (at%) of primary alloying elements (like Cr or Mo) replaced by secondary additions (like Si, Ni, Al, Nb, or Mn) to study synergistic effects on corrosion resistance.

proposed_conditioned_material_variables.name: rolling_temperature_range
proposed_conditioned_material_variables.definition: The specific temperature range (maximum and minimum) maintained during the hot rolling process (e.g., 1090 °C or 816–982 °C).

proposed_conditioned_material_variables.name: cold_reduction_ratio
proposed_conditioned_material_variables.definition: The percentage or specific thickness change achieved during cold rolling (e.g., reduction from 0.100 inch to 0.0625 inch).

proposed_conditioned_material_variables.name: quenching_medium
proposed_conditioned_material_variables.definition: The medium used for rapid cooling after heat treatment, such as water or argon, which affects the retention of phases.

proposed_conditioned_material_variables.name: secondary_phase_presence
proposed_conditioned_material_variables.definition: The identification of specific deleterious phases in the microstructure, such as sigma-phase or chi-phase precipitates, often found along grain boundaries.

proposed_experiment_variables.name: scratch_potential_Escr
proposed_experiment_variables.definition: The specific pitting potential value determined by the scratch method, which is independent of surface finish and polarization rate.

proposed_experiment_variables.name: dissolved_oxygen_concentration
proposed_experiment_variables.definition: The level of dissolved oxygen in the electrolyte, measured in ppb or ppm, identified as a critical governing factor for corrosion susceptibility.

proposed_experiment_variables.name: solution_pretreatment
proposed_experiment_variables.definition: Specific chemical or thermal treatments applied to the electrolyte before testing, such as sulfuric acid neutralization of bicarbonate alkalinity or boiling for deaeration.

proposed_experiment_variables.name: electrolyte_flow_velocity
proposed_experiment_variables.definition: The speed of the solution relative to the specimen surface, measured in feet per second (fps) or similar units.
